_comment: Soft Rotate with radial falloff: rotate every vert by 30° around world Y, weighted by spherical falloff centred at origin (size 1.0). Verts at the centre rotate 30°; verts on the unit sphere stay put. modo_method=analytical: vibe3d's xfrm.softRotate has no MODO equivalent (xfrm.pole is the closest, but it routes through xfrm.rotate which has the documented headless `angle` quirk and would diverge anyway). Analytical reference covers the soft-rotate math both engines agree on.
